rect.style: fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); stroke: rgba(140, 180, 220, 0.35); stroke-width: 2px; stroke-dasharray: 8, 4;

path.style: stroke: rgba(106, 164, 188, 0.55); stroke-width: 2.5px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dasharray: 8, 5;
